patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the OptionBuilder.reset() method not being called in the correct place, resulting in the description being inherited from the previous Option instance created.
patches.changes: - OptionBuilder.reset() was called at the end of the method, but it should be called at the beginning to properly reset the properties.
patches.diff: - OptionBuilder.reset() was called at the end of the method, but it should be called at the beginning to properly reset the properties.
